JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. JURY TRIAL CONT'D FROM 4/15/97. PLTF. PRESENT WITH COUNSEL RICHARD GRABSTEIN. DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL NANCY CONWAY. 12 JURORS AND ONE ALTERNATE PRESENT AND SEATED IN THE JURY BOX. 9:23 AM JURY RETURNED TO THE JURY BOX TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICT. EXHIBITS IN EVIDENCE GIVEN TO BAILIFF FOR THE JURY 10:50 AM JURY RETURNED TO COURT, THEY HAVE REACHED A VERDICT JURY FOUND A VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. SPECIAL VERDICT READ INTO THE RECORD. JURY POLLED AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. VERDICT UNANIMOUS. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED. REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY EXCUSED AND REPORTED TO JURY COMM. ALL EXHIBITS INCLUDING THOSE NOT ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE WITH- DRAWN AND RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL. DEFT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
